title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.400 - Redemption before sale
text:
443.400.  Redemption before sale. — If such property is redeemed by payment to the officer before the sale, such officer shall make a certificate of such redemption, and acknowledge the same before some officer authorized to take acknowledgments of deeds for lands; and such certificate shall be recorded in the office in which the security instrument is recorded, and shall have the same effect as if a deed of release has been filed for record.
(RSMo 1939 § 3475, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1312) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3088; 1919 § 2247; 1909 § 2852
